{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192440B107594BF2532DB53DEF"}"},"total":14692},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7238142597687313204","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人觉得如果在中后期的话、主角需要把各国之间的核武器、哪些大杀器、全部弄掉、简单来说就是让规则来统治世界、毕竟如果一个大国完全沦陷、必然会疯狂让世界重开、惩罚和奖励都要提升、毕竟一个副本失败就惩罚一个城市、有点不痛不痒、就像作者说的龙国有几百个城市、这对大国来说仅仅是抽血，割肉都算不上。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685261459,"group_id":"7198357020792065063","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3532053095126727"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7198357020792065063","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.5131097e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35130,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7237962465123713844","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书写得很好，比我之前看的好太多了、人物和场景还有故事都很不错、突出的人物开始的稚嫩到最后的慢慢改变、虽然说有点类似于半无敌文、但主角智商在线配角人物鲜明。其实写规则怪谈就是这样、要么半无敌、要么就写遵守规则全靠自己的智商心机魄力狠辣不疯魔不成活性恪这样的主角。我觉得我说的这些这本书都有是一本好书、希望继续保持或者创新加油👏","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":82,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742650802DB53DEF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227237962465123713844%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227198357020792065063%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685219914,"group_id":"7198357020792065063","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"是梦还是现实.一叶一世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzUqeLGByCjTgwB8zYtwxbSWKJrLc6MaMuDJD60Jz8iY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"3532053095126727","user_name":"梦似人间人间似梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3532053095126727","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7198357020792065063","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主+诡异+精神病+搞笑+国运】
　　我叫苏铭，是个穿越者。
　　目前就职于青山精神病院，负责“被研究”的重要项目。
　　他们一直说我有病，可我知道我没病，有病的是这个世界。
　　当我逃出精神病院后，却是被【规则怪谈】选中，成为了龙国的天选者，代表龙国参与接下来的怪谈游戏。
　　【叮，怪谈世界正在激活您体内潜藏的特殊天赋....】
      【天赋激活完毕。】
　　【百无禁忌（SSS级）：你是天生的疯狂者，混乱疯狂的思维让你免疫怪谈世界的污染，可以百无禁忌，当你开始犯病的时候，将临时获得可以伤害到怪谈的能力。】
　　苏铭瞪着一双清澈透明的死鱼眼，手持大砍刀，对着一众被逼到角落，瑟瑟发抖的怪谈说道：
　　“我没病！”
（本书怪谈副本皆是原创，目前已开启的副本：诡异的家人、守墓人、小镇神父、驱魔神探.....）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0082fb7360c73ea8173ad501cc63df8c","author":"徐墨卿","author_id":"","book_id":"7198357020792065063","book_name":"我，在逃精神病，被规则怪谈选中","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7198359015284441615","read_count":"54593","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"542912"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"251","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,搞笑轻松,规则怪谈,副本,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pi
